params.prompt: Create a square 3x3 asset sheet of nine small modular UI ornaments for an anime RPG stat bar system for UNBOUND. Transparent-feeling objects on near-black background. No full bars, no text, no numbers, no characters. Each cell contains ONE centered small ornament, icon-sized, crisp, high contrast, dark graphite metal with bone-white edges and subtle colored accent. Style: premium anime RPG status screen, dark fantasy training arc, minimalist Japanese brutalism. Top row: three left origin cap sigils, blue shard, ember shard, green control shard. Middle row: three right endpoint gems, steel blue diamond, red-orange blade gem, teal crystal. Bottom row: three divider/tick ornaments, thin bone-white slash, violet fracture tick, gold arc tick. These must be modular overlays for SwiftUI bars, not complete frames. Keep silhouettes simple and readable at 32px.
